ddls:
CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist who created the album */,
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the label that released the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the album was released */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the album (e.g., CD, LP, Digital) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the album was released */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the album on a music platform */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the album */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the album */,
  "cover_art_url" TEXT /* URL of the album's cover art */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_label_id FOREIGN KEY ("label_id") REFERENCES labels ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the artist */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Death date of the artist */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the artist */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the artist's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the label */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the label is based */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the label was founded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the genre (e.g., Electronic, Experimental, Jazz) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "subgenre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subgenre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subgenres" (
  "subgenre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subgenre */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the subgenre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subgenre */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subgenre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "album_genres" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the album */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the artist in the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id", "artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "releases" (
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the album was released */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the album was released */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the release */,
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_label_id FOREIGN KEY ("label_id") REFERENCES labels ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., artist, administrator, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the album */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the album was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., play, download, share) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)
